title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 10–13, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Hey! Who said I'm a weird guy?

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I don't look weird at all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes you are! Any way I look at it, you look weird!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Shut up! I'm just a hypnotist passing by...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Can you show us your skills?

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Idiots! You guys don't even understand what a hyp- notist is!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: This is our first meeting, no way I'm showing you my hypnotism!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: OK! You guys stare at this!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I'll say "one, two, Jango" and you will all fall asleep!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Hey! What the hell is he doing?

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: It's you! Why can't you be more normal?!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
